sglang.title: [3/N] Achieve fault tolerance at the DP level
sglang.author: ympcMark
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The previous work of this PR only implemented fault tolerance at the EP level, but not at the DP level; we achieved this functionality by maintaining worker information through communication between the Scheduler, TokenizerManager, and DataParallelController.

sglang.title: Use attn_tp_group for all reduce in token embedding
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Previously attn_tp_group in VocabParallelEmbedding is only used for dp_lm_head. For token embedding, it will always use full DP. This PR uses attn_tp_group for all reduce in embedding layer to support DP/TP combination.
Compared to full DP, the performance impact is negligible since embed

sglang.title: Fix wait-for-stage jobs running when call-gate fails
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fix wait-for-stage-a and wait-for-stage-b jobs running when call-gate fails
When call-gate fails, stage-a/b test jobs are skipped, but the wait jobs would still run and either pass (treating skipped as success) or wait forever

Problem:

call-gate fails → all stage-a/b jobs are skipped
wait

The pr-test-finish job did not depend on wait-for-stage-a or wait-for-stage-b. When a wait-for-stage job failed (e.g., due to timeout), pr-test-finish would still succeed because it only checks the jobs in

This PR changes the OffloadingConnector to d
